title: Past tense (preterite): regular -ar verbs
objectives: Form the preterite of any regular -ar verb

vocab.es: hablé / hablaste / habló / hablamos / hablasteis / hablaron

grammar_notes: Note the accents on yo (-é) and él/ella (-ó) — they distinguish past from present.
'hablamos' is identical in present and preterite — context clarifies.
The preterite is for COMPLETED actions in the past — like Russian perfective aspect (сделал, купил).
example_phrases: Ayer trabajé hasta las ocho. (Yesterday I worked until eight.)
